parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO visitor_countries (country_code, country_name, visit_count, last_visit)
VALUES ('{{ $json.country_code }}', '{{ $json.country_name }}', 1, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (country_code) DO UPDATE SET
  visit_count = visitor_countries.visit_count + 1,
  country_name = EXCLUDED.country_name,
  last_visit = NOW()

=INSERT INTO visitor_sessions (session_id, last_seen, country_code, country_name)
VALUES ('{{ $json.session_id }}', NOW(), '{{ $json.country_code }}', '{{ $json.country_name }}')
ON CONFLICT (session_id) DO UPDATE SET
  last_seen = NOW(),
  country_code = EXCLUDED.country_code,
  country_name = EXCLUDED.country_name
